text: In the first scene, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The room behind the glass is being prepared—chairs askew and equipment mid-assembly—hinting at events yet to unfold. The sterile quiet is tinged with potential. In the second scene, the vivid colors and bold letters of the exhibition wall ignite my curiosity. Here I am surrounded by the energy of ideas: R&D, innovation, and the persistent human urge to push boundaries. I feel intellectually invigorated, reminded of the profundity of progress and our place in guiding it.
